title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. vulgaris
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. vulgaris, also known as kidney vetch or common kidney vetch, is a perennial flowering plant in the legume family native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be used to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as a diuretic. Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. vulgaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
